artifact: Release and upstream-lineage audit for arXiv:2607.00304v1

focal_source.release_boundary: The complete immutable-v1 arXiv source archive contains neither p16_data.json nor triangle_verification.py, although Sections 4, Reproducibility Statement, and source main.tex claim that both are provided in supplementary material. The arXiv record and source contain no repository, dataset, DOI, author homepage, or contact address.

upstream_primary_source.title: A Diagnostic Framework and Multi-Evaluator Audit of Evaluator-Driven Preference Dynamics in Self-Adapting LLM Agents
upstream_primary_source.release_boundary: The upstream paper names nine JSON files for 122 runs and claims that all code/data were submitted as supplementary material, but its complete immutable-v1 source archive contains only manuscript/figure assets and gives no repository URL. It therefore supplies lineage descriptions, not replayable seed-level evidence.

related_protocol_source.release_boundary: The related protocol manuscript repeatedly refers to an implementation repository, JSON schema, and reference snapshot, but the complete source archive includes no URL and no implementation/data files. It does not recover the focal paper's missing release.

discovery.result: Only arXiv records/PDF/HTML, generic mirrors, and unrelated GitHub results were found. No paper-owned or author-linked metric, seed-level data, or analysis release was located. This is a time-bounded release audit, not proof that no later release can appear.
